NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on this 1st day of October, 2023, by and between TechInsights Pte Ltd, a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 200912345K, having its registered office at 123 Tech Avenue, #05-01, Singapore 567890 ("Disclosing Party"), and Dr. Jennifer Lim, NRIC S8765432B, residing at 456 Innovation Road, #12-34, Singapore 123456 ("Receiving Party").

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. The Receiving Party agrees to hold in strict confidence any and all proprietary information disclosed by the Disclosing Party, including but not limited to business plans, technological data, and financial projections. Such information may be provided verbally, in writing, or by any other means and is intended solely for the purpose of evaluating potential business collaboration.

2. NON-DISCLOSURE OBLIGATIONS. The Receiving Party shall not disclose, publish, or disseminate any Confidential Information received under this Agreement to any third party without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party. The Receiving Party agrees to take all reasonable measures to protect the confidentiality of the Disclosing Party's information, ensuring that it is not used for any purpose outside the scope of this Agreement.

For any inquiries related to this Agreement, please contact TechInsights Pte Ltd at +65 6123 4567 or via email at legal@techinsights.sg.
